# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: External Contributor CI

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Checkout PR code safely
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: pr-code/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: tests
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate test report
        id: report
        if: always()
        run: |
          INSTALL_STATUS="${{ steps.install.outcome }}"
          LINT_STATUS="${{ steps.lint.outcome }}"
          TEST_STATUS="${{ steps.tests.outcome }}"
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"

          icon_for() {
            if [ "$1" = "success" ]; then echo "✅"; 
            elif [ "$1" = "skipped" ]; then echo "⏭️";
            else echo "❌"; fi
          }

          OVERALL="success"
          if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ] || [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" ]; then
            OVERALL="failure"
          fi

          {
            echo "comment<<ENDOFCOMMENT"
            echo "## 🤖 Automated CI Results for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
            echo ""
            echo "**Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo "**Branch:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}\` → \`${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}\`"
            echo "**Contributor:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}"
            echo ""
            echo "### Step Results"
            echo ""
            echo "| Step | Status |"
            echo "|------|--------|"
            echo "| 📦 Install Dependencies | $(icon_for $INSTALL_STATUS) $INSTALL_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | $(icon_for $LINT_STATUS) $LINT_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | $(icon_for $TEST_STATUS) $TEST_STATUS |"
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | $(icon_for $BUILD_STATUS) $BUILD_STATUS |"
            echo ""

            if [ "$OVERALL" = "failure" ]; then
              echo "### ❌ Overall: Some checks failed"
              echo ""
              
              if [ "$INSTALL_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ -f pr-code/install-output.txt ]; then
                echo "<details><summary>📦 Install Output (last 30 lines)</summary>"
                echo ""
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -30 pr-code/install-output.txt
                echo "\`\`\`"
                echo "</details>"
                echo ""
              fi

              if [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$LINT_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f pr-code/lint-output.txt ]; then
                echo "<details><summary>🔍 Lint Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
                echo ""
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -50 pr-code/lint-output.txt
                echo "\`\`\`"
                echo "</details>"
                echo ""
              fi

              if [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$TEST_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f pr-code/test-output.txt ]; then
                echo "<details><summary>🧪 Test Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
                echo ""
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -50 pr-code/test-output.txt
                echo "\`\`\`"
                echo "</details>"
                echo ""
              fi

              if [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "success" ] && [ "$BUILD_STATUS" != "skipped" ] && [ -f pr-code/build-output.txt ]; then
                echo "<details><summary>🏗️ Build Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
                echo ""
                echo "\`\`\`"
                tail -50 pr-code/build-output.txt
                echo "\`\`\`"
                echo "</details>"
                echo ""
              fi

              echo "Please review the errors above and update your PR. If you need help, feel free to ask! 🙏"
            else
              echo "### ✅ Overall: All checks passed!"
              echo ""
              echo "Great job @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}! All CI checks are passing. 🎉"
            fi

            echo ""
            echo "---"
            echo "*This is an automated comment generated by the CI workflow. It will be updated on each push to this PR.*"
            echo "ENDOFCOMMENT"
          } >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

          echo "overall=$OVERALL" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Find existing CI comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        id: find-comment
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: 'github-actions[bot]'
          body-includes: '🤖 Automated CI Results'

      - name: Post or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          body: ${{ steps.report.outputs.comment }}
          edit-mode: replace

      - name: Set final status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.report.outputs.overall }}" = "failure" ]; then
            echo "::error::One or more CI steps failed. Check the PR comment for details."
            exit 1
          fi
